$doc: Full production plan for the NWG The Game YouTube cinematic trailer.

trailerMeta.title: NWG The Game - Cinematic Trailer
trailerMeta.subtitle: Where Legends Are Forged
trailerMeta.tone: Epic heroic cinematic - Hans Zimmer-style orchestral
trailerMeta.style: UE5 photorealistic, cinematic camera work, dramatic lighting
trailerMeta.audience: Gaming community, MapleStory fans, MMO enthusiasts

worldDesign.concept: The NWG world is a fantasy realm inspired by MapleStory's iconic locations - reimagined as a photorealistic, breathtaking open world.

environments.name: The Enchanted Canopy (inspired by Ellinia)
environments.description: Vast mystical forest with towering ancient trees containing carved homes and staircases. Bioluminescent mushrooms, floating magical particles, fairy lights in the canopy. Vines and moss over ancient ruins.
environments.lighting: Dappled golden sunlight, bioluminescent glow, volumetric god rays
environments.mapleInspiration: Ellinia - magical forest for magicians, giant tree platforms, fairy aesthetic

environments.name: The Shattered Plateau (inspired by Perion)
environments.description: Dramatic rocky highland with wind-carved sandstone pillars, deep canyons, ancient warrior totems. Amber sunset sky. Crumbling colosseum arenas, warrior statues. Dust and embers on hot winds.
environments.lighting: Golden hour sunset, dramatic shadows, amber haze, distant lightning
environments.mapleInspiration: Perion - rocky wasteland for warriors, highland plateau

environments.name: NumbahWan Guild Hall (inspired by Henesys)
environments.description: Warm sunlit guild HQ in rolling green hills with massive ancient oak. Grand stone-and-wood building with golden NWG banners. Round table, weapons on walls, warm fireplace. Sunny meadows outside.
environments.lighting: Warm golden afternoon sun, cozy fireplace glow, lens flares
environments.mapleInspiration: Henesys - sunny grasslands, the social hub

environments.name: The Neon Depths (inspired by Kerning City)
environments.description: Dark cyberpunk underground city in massive caverns. Neon signs reflecting off rain-slicked streets. Steam vents, dark alleys, holographic billboards. Gritty but vibrant.
environments.lighting: Neon reflections (cyan, magenta, orange), volumetric fog, rain
environments.mapleInspiration: Kerning City - run-down urban area for thieves

environments.name: The Celestial Citadel (inspired by Orbis/Ereve/Ludibrium)
environments.description: Breathtaking floating island castle above clouds. Marble pillars, crystal spires, golden clockwork mechanisms. Bridges of light, cloud sea below. Divine light from central temple.
environments.lighting: Heavenly golden hour, god rays through clouds, crystal refractions
environments.mapleInspiration: Orbis floating city + Ereve floating island + Ludibrium clockwork

environments.name: The Abyssal Throne (inspired by Zakum/Root Abyss)
environments.description: Colossal underground cavern with dark throne. Massive chains from ceiling. Lava rivers below stone bridges. Enormous shadowy boss entity - multi-armed, glowing red eyes. Dark crystal pillars.
environments.lighting: Red-orange lava glow, dark purple shadow energy, dramatic rim lights
environments.mapleInspiration: Zakum boss arena + Root Abyss dungeon

musicDirection.style: Hans Zimmer-inspired epic orchestral - massive brass, deep percussion (taiko), soaring strings, ethereal choir

structure.instruments: Solo piano, distant strings, ambient synth
Strings swell, French horns, harp, choir hums
Full brass, driving taiko, soaring violin, power choir
Maximum orchestra, thunderous timpani, dark choir, bass drops
Soaring melody reprise, full choir, final piano note

scenes.title: COLD OPEN - The World Awakens
scenes.description: BLACK SCREEN. Piano note. Fade in: ECU bioluminescent mushroom. Camera pulls back revealing vast Enchanted Canopy. Crane up through trees. Drone over treetops to horizon.

scenes.title: THE WORLD - Realm of Wonders
scenes.description: Quick-cut environment montage: Forest at dawn, Plateau at sunset with lightning, Neon Depths alive with color, Celestial Citadel above clouds, Guild Hall with empty round table, NWG crest glowing.

scenes.title: RegginO - The Enchantress
scenes.description: RegginO in sunlit clearing. Pink hair flowing with magic. Raises hand - rainbow energy spirals from fingertips. Forest blooms with flowers where magic touches. Small slime creatures watch in awe.

scenes.title: Natehouoho - The Shadow
scenes.description: Drops from above into rain-soaked neon alley. Crouch landing, rises slowly. Butterfly wings UNFURL - teal/purple iridescence catches neon lights. Cross-draws dual swords. Rain droplets frozen in slow-mo.

scenes.title: Sweetiez - The Prodigy
scenes.description: Sits on massive mushroom by sparkling stream reading a tome. Looks up with determined innocence. Stands - hair rises with magical energy, crystal wing glows bright.

scenes.title: Panthera - The Seraphim
scenes.description: Marble balcony overlooking cloud sea. Crimson hair whips in wind. Golden mechanical wing-guards ACTIVATE - dual-layer angel wings erupt open. Holy white-blue orb materializes. Avenging angel.

scenes.title: RegginA - The Paladin
scenes.description: Walks across stone bridge over canyon dragging massive golden hammer (sparks trail). Swings hammer up, SLAMS down - shockwave cracks stone. Stands with planted hammer, black bow contrasting amber sunset.

scenes.title: Santaboy - The Festive Warrior
scenes.description: Descends from above with golden wings catching light. Lands with grace, plants candy cane staff. Adjusts glasses, rose in teeth, confident smirk. Twirls candy cane in combat flourish - points it forward like a general.

scenes.title: CIA's MOMENT - Pure Cuteness
scenes.description: CIA sleeping by fireplace, ears twitching. Glowing butterfly lands on nose - eyes cross. Sneezes, chases butterfly, paws slipping on floor. Crashes into weapon pile, pops out wearing oversized helmet. Head tilt. MEME GOLD.

scenes.title: THE GUILD ASSEMBLES
scenes.description: Quick cuts: each character arriving at round table. Dark shadow falls - dark energy column on horizon. Team grabs weapons. ICONIC LINEUP - all 6 + CIA walking slow-mo side by side toward camera.

scenes.title: THE BATTLE - Into the Abyss
scenes.description: Rapid action montage vs colossal shadow boss. Each character gets combat highlight: RegginO barrier, Natehouoho dash-slash, Sweetiez crystal blast, Panthera holy rain, Santaboy candy cane parry. Boss pushes them back. RegginA stands defiant. Combined ultimate attack engulfs boss.

scenes.title: VICTORY & TITLE REVEAL
scenes.description: White flash. Silence. Guild hall celebration - team around table laughing. CIA asleep on RegginA's lap. Warm details. Cut to black. Gold title: 'NWG THE GAME'. Tagline: 'Where Legends Are Forged.' Final piano chord.
